title: CTAB DNA Extraction for Genotyping
author: Yaowu Yuan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.3rrgm56

steps.title: Grind fresh plant tissue with liquid...
steps.instruction: Grind fresh plant tissue with liquid nitrogen or silica-gel dried tissue in a 1.5 ml Eppie tube. A little silica gel grains in the tube actually helps the grinding.

steps.title: Add 750 µL, CTAB DNA Extraction buffer
steps.instruction: Add 750 µL, CTAB DNA Extraction buffer .

steps.title: Incubate the CTAB/plant extract mixture for...
steps.instruction: Incubate the CTAB/plant extract mixture for 00:15:00 at 55 °C in the heat block and invert to mix throughout the 15 minutes.

steps.title: Add 500 µL, Chloroform
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, Chloroform : IsoAmyl Alcohol (24:1) in the hood and mix the solution by invertingthe tubes ( do not vortex ).

steps.title: Transfer the upper aqueous phase only...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper aqueous phase only to a new eppie tube (~ 500 µL ).

steps.title: Add 50 µL, 7
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL, 7.5M Ammonium acetate followed by 500 µL, ice cold 100% ethanol and invert to mix.

steps.title: Put tubes in -20 °C freezer...
steps.instruction: Put tubes in -20 °C freezer for 00:30:00 (or longer) to precipitate the DNA.

steps.title: Centrifuge at for 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at for 00:15:00 . You should see a pellet at the bottom (align the tubesso that you know where the pellet is in case you can’t see it very well).

steps.title: Remove the supernatant and wash the DNA pellet as follows
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant and wash the DNA pellet as follows. (1/2)

steps.title: Remove the supernatant and wash the DNA pellet as follows
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant and wash the DNA pellet as follows. (2/2)

steps.title: Remove all the supernatant and allow...
steps.instruction: Remove all the supernatant and allow the DNA pellet to dry in the hood (approx. 00:20:00 ). Do not over dry the pellet since it will be hard to re-dissolve.

steps.title: Resuspend the DNA in 100 µL, dH2O
steps.instruction: Resuspend the DNA in 100 µL, dH2O .

steps.title: Run the DNA on a 1
steps.instruction: Run the DNA on a 1.0% agarose gel to check the quality of the DNA.
